mapper.select: SELECT uf.followee_id AS user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, uf.create_time AS follow_time FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = uf.followee_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{followerId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY uf.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow (follower_id, followee_id, create_time) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}, #{createTime})
